Danilo Set to Leave Juventus for Brazil, Napoli Move Falls Through
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, Juventus defender Danilo is preparing to bid farewell to Juventus and Italy. The 33-year-old former Porto and Manchester City player has decided to return to his homeland, where Flamengo and Santos are vying for his signature.
